ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cookie (e.g., Performance, Description) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie (e.g., _ga, _gid) */,
  "third_party" TEXT /* Third party associated with the cookie (e.g., google-analytics.com) */,
  "typology" TEXT /* Typology of the cookie (e.g., Session, Persistent) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration the cookie will remain active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the cookie's purpose and privacy policy link */,
  "cookie_domain" TEXT /* Domain for which the cookie is set */,
  "cookie_path" TEXT /* Path for which the cookie is valid */,
  "secure_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cookie is transmitted over HTTPS only */,
  "http_only_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cookie is accessible only through the HTTP protocol */,
  "same_site" TEXT /* SameSite attribute of the cookie (e.g., None, Lax, Strict) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for client inquiries */,
  "account_created" TEXT /* Date when the client account was created */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "client_plan" TEXT /* Type of plan the client is on (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "client_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client to which the user belongs */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for hashing the user's password */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was provided */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie usage was accepted */,
  "consent_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent will expire */,
  "consent_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the consent was given */,
  "consent_device" TEXT /* Type of device from which the consent was given (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for which the report is generated */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the report is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors recorded */,
  "unique_users" INTEGER /* Number of unique users during the month */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate percentage for the month */,
  "total_page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views recorded during the month */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of user sessions during the month */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of single-page sessions in which there was no further interaction */,
  "new_vs_returning_visitors" TEXT /* Ratio of new visitors to returning visitors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privacy policy */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for which the policy applies */,
  "policy_text" TEXT /* Text of the privacy policy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last updated */,
  "policy_version" TEXT /* Version number of the privacy policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the privacy policy (e.g., active, draft, archived) */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privacy_policies_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, access report) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "log_device" TEXT /* Type of device from which the action was performed (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "log_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
